mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY status DESC, user_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.phone, u.user_type, u.auth_status, u.is_verified, uv.real_name, uv.id_card_number, uv.verification_status FROM users u LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON u.user_id = uv.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, phone, email, avatar_url, user_type, admin_role, status, is_verified, auth_status, region) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{userType}, #{adminRole}, #{status}, #{isVerified}, #{authStatus}, #{region})
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash},
phone = #{phone}, phone = NULL,
email = #{email}, email = NULL,
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
region = #{region}, region = NULL,
user_type = #{userType}, admin_role = #{adminRole}, status = #{status}, is_verified = #{isVerified}, auth_status = #{authStatus},
deactivated_phone = #{deactivatedPhone}, deactivated_phone = NULL,
updated_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE deactivated_phone = #{phone} AND status = 0
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status != 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET phone = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
